jobs.name: Daily Gain Rank (Pre-Market)
jobs.description: Ranks all tracked underlyings by predicted gain potential at market open

jobs.name: Daily Gain Validate (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Validates predictions vs NSE actual results, saves OI snapshot for next session

jobs.name: Daily Accuracy Trend (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Prints 14-day accuracy trend, fires retrain signal if Spearman rho < 0.40 for 3 days

jobs.name: Auto Model Retrain (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Reads state/retrain_signal.json; if present, retrains ensemble_predictor models and clears signal

jobs.name: NSE FO Bhavcopy Download (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Downloads NSE F&O bhavcopy EOD archive after market close. Stores to storage/bhavcopy/. Used as P3 fallback source with real OI change data (CHG_IN_OI).

jobs.name: Data Source Health Check (Pre-Market)
jobs.description: Probes all data sources (NSE, bhavcopy, nsepython, jugaad, yfinance). Saves state/datasource_health.json. Alerts CHANGE_LOG if resilience CRITICAL or LOW.
